exploration_notes: **Prometheus/prometheus**: Tracer initialization lives in `tracing/tracing.go` where `Manager.ApplyConfig` calls `buildTracerProvider` to create an `tracesdk.NewTracerProvider` and installs it globally via `otel.SetTracerProvider`. Spans are created throughout the codebase using `otel.Tracer("").Start(ctx, name)` — in `storage/remote/client.go` (Remote Store/Read), `storage/remote/queue_manager.go` (batch sends with attributes and RecordError), `scrape/scrape.go` (Scrape spans), `rules/group.go`
